description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the continuumio/anaconda3 Docker image and runs python -V in a global before_script. Define a single job named run in the default test stage that executes the following shell commands in order: pip install redis, python setup.py bdist_wheel, pip install dist/*, pip list, and pytest. Configure the run job to collect the built wheel files matching dist/*.whl as artifacts. No additional services, caches, or conditional rules are required.
